features: adidas Pure Game Eau de Toilette is a woody and aromatic fragrance
The scent is constructed with a blend of sparkling lemon, green basil and fresh pepper, enhanced by lavender and cypress, combined with a trail of patchouli, smokey woods and notes of tonka bean
Made with 25% recycled glass and the cap with 50% recycled plastic
With natural lemon and pine essential oil
Long lasting scent and vegan formula
description: Product Description adidas Pure Game Eau de Toilette is an woody, aromatic fragrance for football fans and players all over the world, proving that impossible is nothing whenever teamwork is involved. The scent is constructed with a blend of sparklinkg lemon, green basil and fresh pepper, enhanced by lavender and cypress, combined with a trail of patchouli, smokey woods and notes of tonkabean. The Eau de Toilette bottle is made with 25% recycled glass and the cap with 50% recycled plastic. With natural lemon and pine essential oil. Long-lasting scent and vegan formula. Ingredients INGREDIENTS: ALCOHOL DENAT., AQUA/WATER/EAU, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, PARFUM/FRAGRANCE, ETHYLHEXYL SALICYLATE, BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE, LINALOOL, LIMONENE, COUMARIN, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE, CITRONELLOL, ALCOHOL, CITRAL, TRIS(TETRAMETHYLHYDROXYPIPERIDINOL) CITRATE, GERANIOL, YELLOW 5 (CI 19140), RED 4 (CI 14700), EXT. VIOLET 2 (CI 60730), BLUE 1 (CI 42090). Directions Spray to wrists and neck for lasting fragrance. See more
